atomic_structure_periodicity.name: Atomic Structure & Periodicity
atomic_structure_periodicity.description: Atomic structure, electron configuration, the periodic law, and trends in element properties.

chemical_bonding.name: Chemical Bonding
chemical_bonding.description: Types of chemical bonds (covalent, ionic, metallic), crystal lattices, and their relationship to substance properties.

inorganic_reactions.name: Inorganic Reactions
inorganic_reactions.description: Substance classification, nomenclature, ion exchange reactions, redox reactions, genetic chains, and qualitative analysis.

kinetics_equilibrium.name: Kinetics & Equilibrium
kinetics_equilibrium.description: Reaction rate, influencing factors, catalysis, chemical equilibrium, and Le Chatelier's principle.

solutions_electrolytes.name: Solutions & Electrolytes
solutions_electrolytes.description: Electrolytes, dissociation, and acid-base reactions in solutions.

calculations.name: Calculations
calculations.description: Molar mass, amount of substance, solutions, stoichiometry, and reaction yield.

organic_chemistry.name: Organic Chemistry
organic_chemistry.description: Classes of organic compounds, nomenclature, reaction types, and isomerism.

electrochemistry.name: Electrochemistry
electrochemistry.description: Electrolysis, galvanic cells, electrode potentials, and the activity series.
